prompt: The framework only permits a specific handful of HTTP status numbers when one address forwards to another. Where is the allow-set of those permitted numbers declared, and where is the routine that picks the right number for a given forwarding rule?

rubric.answer_shape: one declared set, one selection function

evidence.claim: declares the permitted forwarding status numbers
selects the status number for a forwarding rule

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
